title: ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER - 211info
text: MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY ADDICTIONS SERVICES CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides outpatient treatment services, including assessments, individual and group counseling, intensive services, drug court and DUII Diversion Services, and referrals to residential treatment when needed. Intensive Treatment and Recovery Services (IOP Program) are also offered for families affected by addiction. 1610 Woods Court Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 386-2620 2166 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 386-2620 ext 2166 Terry Rogers [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information and to schedule an appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, Medicare, and most private insurance. Sliding scale fees available for uninsured patients. Some grant-supported services are provided at no cost. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Proof of income if applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Sherman, and Wasco Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-noon and 1pm-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the Heights off 13th and Pacific Avenues Services: Assessment for Substance Use Disorders Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment DUI Offender Programs Substance Use Disorder Counseling Other Services Offered At This Location: MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - MENTAL HEALTH SERVICES MENTAL HEALTH SUPPORT SERVICES - EARLY ASSESSMENT AND SUPPORT ALLIANCE REHABILITATION/HABILITATION SERVICES - COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENTAL DISABILITIES PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MID-COLUMBIA CENTER FOR LIVING HOOD RIVER COUNTY
